audit_items.proof_trace: The entire file is debug-only code (compiled only when LDAP_THREAD_DEBUG is defined). All malloc/calloc/realloc return values are guarded by assert(), and all other pointer dereferences are either properly null-checked (getenv result at L274), protected by short-circuit evaluation (pool double-pointer pattern at L1199/L1227), or valid by API contract (internal slapd pointers). A null dereference would require the pathological combination of LDAP_THREAD_DEBUG + NDEBUG + OOM, which is semantically contradictory since LDAP_THREAD_DEBUG is explicitly a debugging facility where asserts are expected to be active.
